a heretic prophet  

Monster
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search

a heretic prophet in Toxxulia Forest

Uploaded June 4th, 2021 by BremricZAM

Category: EverQuest

Minimum Level: 4
Maximum Level: 5
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2021-06-04 19:47:24

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Factions Increased:
  Deepwater Knights
  Gate Callers
  Crimson Hands
  Craftkeepers
Factions Decreased:
  Heretics

Report a correction

Post Comment
Class unknown?
QuoteReply
# Dec 05 2025 at 5:07 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
Conned dark blue to level 5 paladin. Dropped only a handful of copper pieces. The one I killed was male, not female, and didn't cast any spells. That would only make sense if he was a shadowknight, because he wouldn't have any spells yet at that low level, but he didn't even try to harm touch me, which NPC shadowknights usually lead in with, so his class is still a mystery to me. Maybe I just killed him too quickly for him to attempt casting anything. I can't imagine an Erudite without any magic of any description at all. Every class they can be uses magic in one way or another.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
targeting pets
QuoteReply
# Apr 18 2002 at 10:10 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770636073
Scholar
30 posts
One more thing, you must target the abandoned Heretic pets head in order to select him. When looting target his weapon.
▲ Page top
triggered spawn
QuoteReply
# Apr 18 2002 at 9:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770636073
Scholar
30 posts
You can wait around forever for these guys to spawn or you can Kill all the abandoned Heretic pets and he will spawn at around pos 1840, pos 410. You can kill the lot of abandoned pets at once since they all spawn in the hut at pos 1104, neg 844. Good luck.
▲ Page top
Varying Levels
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2002 at 11:31 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This critter can come in various levels, I just saw one that conned even for my 5th level Erudite necro.

I didn't attack it, on the theory that casters are more dangerous than their level...anyone think I coulda won?
▲ Page top
Drops?
QuoteReply
# Dec 14 2001 at 10:40 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Anyone know what these guys drop and their stats?
▲ Page top
RE: Drops?
QuoteReply
# Feb 16 2002 at 10:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762757580
View User Forum
6 posts
They usually have no weapon or a warhammer. You can loot a few silver or no coin. They cast cleric spells.
▲ Page top
Red
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2001 at 2:44 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This sucker was red to me at lvl 24. I am a paladin and these things must be at least lvl 27
▲ Page top
RE: Red
QuoteReply
# Apr 14 2002 at 11:46 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
dummy, thay are higher lvls in STONEBRUNT not here
▲ Page top
location
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2001 at 9:17 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
i need faction with deepwater knights? can anyone tell me where they spawn?

slim aka alexjim
▲ Page top
RE: location
QuoteReply
# Feb 16 2002 at 10:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762757580
View User Forum
6 posts
The heretic prophet can be found in the forest anywhere from the bridge to erudin town gates. The guards will not help you if attacked by him.
He walks around killing creatures and young erudites.
▲ Page top
re. Heretic Prophet Levels
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2001 at 11:11 AM Rating: Decent
Vendiven
Scholar
18 posts
They con blue to my 6th level Shaman. The first three I came across killed me or drove me back to Erudin. Then I got smart and cast Fleeting Fury on myself before casting Frost Bolt on them. I was able to defeat the next two I ran across in this manner, with the loss of three health bubbles each time. I plan to continue the hunt often ;-)


____________________________
I can lead you to the Dragon's Horde....


Then sit back and watch as He eats you.
▲ Page top
Prophets Head
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2001 at 1:12 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
A prophet attacked me and my group managed to kill it. It had a Prophets head (no drop item) to loot.
▲ Page top
Heretic Prophet factions
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2000 at 6:51 AM Rating: Decent
DinkumThinkum
Sage
54 posts
Killed a Heretic Prophet today, and got the following faction changes:

Deepwater Knights, Gate Callers, Craftkeepers, and Crimson Hands all got better.

Heretics faction got worse.
▲ Page top
level
QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2000 at 10:10 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
im a lvl 4 enchater and i can kill 3 of em at the same time none were red NONE!
▲ Page top
RE: level
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2001 at 6:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246402577
118 posts
yes im pretty sure they go as low as four or so
▲ Page top
RE: level
QuoteReply
# Jun 01 2001 at 11:03 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Yeah right! kill 4 at a time.

I have never seen more than one of these in Tox forest at any given time. They don't spawn that many.

And from last I heard, enchanters can't track.
▲ Page top
Heretic levels
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2000 at 2:17 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I'm a Mage of the 9th year. These boys are very green to me. They must be 3-5. Check out: http://www.geocities.com/ficticiousname9/zone/Toxxulia_Forest.html
